0: To ensure reliability in critical applications, the paradigm is shifting from simple,
1: prompt-driven agents to advanced "contractors" bound by formal agreements. These
2: contractor agents operate on explicit, verifiable terms, allowing them to negotiate,
3: decompose tasks, and self-validate their work to meet rigorous quality standards. This
4: structured approach transforms agents from unpredictable tools into accountable
5: systems capable of handling complex, high-stakes tasks. Ultimately, this evolution is
6: crucial for building the trust required to deploy sophisticated agentic AI in
12: 3. Survey on Evaluation of LLM-based Agents, https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.16416
